# Giovanni Doni

> Tech Lead specialising in ML systems for energy and operational domains — BESS dispatch optimization, production forecasting, and distributed energy management.

Giovanni Doni is an AI/ML Engineer and Tech Lead with a PhD in Computational Physics. He works at the intersection of machine learning, optimisation, and energy systems — including BESS optimisation, dispatch algorithms, and grid services. 10+ years owning the delivery of ML/AI systems in production, mentoring teams, and setting technical vision.

## Contact

- Website: https://giovannidoni.github.io
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/giovanni-doni

## Skills

- **ML & AI**: LLMs, Computer Vision, NLP, MLOps, Deep Learning
- **Infrastructure**: AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Spark
- **Languages**: Python, SQL, Scala, R, TypeScript
- **Frameworks**: TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, Pandas, Argo

## Experience

- **Founding Tech Lead** at Zenvi (June 2025 - Present) — Founding Tech Lead / Head of AI, owning technical and analytical foundations from zero to first product.
- **Senior Machine Learning Engineer** at Deliveroo (Feb 2021 - 2025) — Led ML/AI initiatives, fine-tuned LLMs, developed models achieving £20M+ in cost savings.
- **Research Advisor** at SUPSI (Mar 2020 - Feb 2022) — Applied ML to materials research, published in high-impact journals.
- **Senior Machine Learning Engineer** at Tesco (Jul 2018 - Sep 2020) — Led ML-powered pricing, achieved 1%+ increase in retained profit.
- **Senior Data Scientist** at SCL Elections (Aug 2015 - May 2018) — Built ML models for £10M+ projects across insurance, healthcare, and elections.

## Education

- PhD in Physics, King's College London (2011–2015)
- MSc Material Engineering, University of Trieste (2008–2011), First Class Honours
- BSc Industrial Engineering, University of Trieste (2004–2007), First Class Honours

## Blog Posts (LabNotes)

- [How to Set Up Maltbot in a VM: Beginner's Guide to Safe AI Automation](https://giovannidoni.github.io/blog/maltbot-howto): Step-by-step guide to running Maltbot in a secure virtual machine with access to thousands of apps via Zapier MCP, without giving AI full control of your real computer.
- [Magma Beneath the Interface: How AI is Shifting Product Development](https://giovannidoni.github.io/blog/deeper-in-the-stack): Exploring how AI is moving the origin of product ideas deeper into the stack, with backend iteration leading creative processes and context becoming a programmatic layer.
- [Fitting Intelligence: A Modular AI Stack for Machine Learning Engineers](https://giovannidoni.github.io/blog/fitting-intelligence): Senior ML Engineer's guide to building modular AI stacks with selective LLMs, privacy-safe orchestration, and scalable intelligence systems for production environments.
- [Scaling LLMs in Production: ML Engineer's Guide from Deliveroo Experience](https://giovannidoni.github.io/blog/scaling-llms-production-deliveroo): Senior ML Engineer's deep dive into challenges and solutions for deploying large language models at scale in production environments, with real-world lessons from leading tech companies.
- [From the Dolomites to Data: What Mountains Teach ML Engineers About Success](https://giovannidoni.github.io/blog/dolomites-data-mountains-ml): Senior ML Engineer's insights on drawing parallels between mountain climbing and machine learning career development - patience, preparation, and strategic thinking for tech leadership success.
- [Building Robust ML Pipelines: Senior Engineer's Guide to Kubernetes and Argo](https://giovannidoni.github.io/blog/robust-ml-pipelines-kubernetes-argo): Comprehensive MLOps guide from a Senior ML Engineer on orchestrating production machine learning workflows using Kubernetes, Argo, and modern container orchestration for scalable AI systems.

## LinkedIn Posts

- [When Writing Becomes the Interface](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:share:7366037340965789697): The share of human thought expressed through writing has risen from ancient scripts to the digital age. With tools like ChatGPT, this shift may accelerate, making written language the primary bridge between humans and intelligent systems.
- [Beyond the Linear Chat](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:share:7386739886822871040): I keep noticing how difficult it is to find, reference, or organise past conversations in ChatGPT. It’s powerful for thinking but weak for retrieval, still trapped in a linear chat paradigm that limits its potential as a true knowledge base.
- [From Shazam to the AI Growth Bet](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:share:7355928384205422592): Shazam was among the first products built around AI from day one, capturing what was to come. Today’s wave sees business leaders betting on AI for growth rather than efficiency—whether that delivers new revenue or just sharper optimization remains to be seen.
- [Hidden Patterns in the Latest Y Combinator Startups](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:share:7354061415579561985): After reviewing 400 YC startups, I spotted clear patterns in workflow tools and agentic systems, and one idea stood out—making petty-crime prosecution economically viable.
